subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter hath attained, in the Most Great Horizon, unto the glance of favor of the Lord of Names. Thy call hath been heard and thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله کتابت در منظر اکبر بلحاظ عنایت مالک اسما فائز ندایت شنیده شد و کتابت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
